message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with dependency version bumps

Lockfile refresh adding egg v0.11.0 e-graph library and its transitive
dependencies (num-bigint, quanta, symbol_table, symbolic_expressions,
env_logger). Also updates thiserror references to support both v1.x and
v2.x side-by-side as required by the new dependency tree. Adds fj-egraph
workspace crate entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
